final:
module RefModule(
    input [2:0] sel,
    input [7:0] in,
    output out);

    wire __out_tmp = (sel == 3'b000) ? in[0] :
                 (sel == 3'b001) ? in[1] :
                 (sel == 3'b010) ? in[2] :
                 (sel == 3'b011) ? in[3] :
                 (sel == 3'b100) ? in[4] :
                 (sel == 3'b101) ? in[5] :
                 (sel == 3'b110) ? in[6] :
                                   in[7];
    assign out = __out_tmp;
endmodule
